title: ICAI Announces CA Final Exams to be Held Twice a Year from May 2026 Onwards
content:
# ICAI Announces CA Final Exams to be Held Twice a Year from May 2026 Onwards

Ek important update hai ICAI aspirants ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne announce kiya hai ki Chartered Accountants Final Examinations ab saal mein do baar conduct kiye jaayenge, effective from May 2026 onwards.

Pehle, CA Final Examinations saal mein teen baar, yaani January, May, aur September mein hote the. Lekin, stakeholders ke feedback ko dekhte hue, ICAI Council ne yeh decision liya hai.

Here are the key details:

*   **Old Examination Frequency:** Thrice a year (January, May, September).
*   **New Examination Frequency:** Twice a year (May and November).
*   **Effective From:** May 2026 Chartered Accountants Examination and onwards.
*   **Discontinued Attempts:** The January and September examination cycles for CA Final will be discontinued from May 2026 onwards.
*   **Notification Date:** This significant announcement was made on April 6, 2026.
*   **Impact on Other Exams:** Is announcement ka CA Inter ya Foundation exams par koi asar nahi hoga; yeh change sirf CA Final Examinations ke liye hai.

This change aims to streamline the examination process and align it with best practices, providing clarity for students planning their attempts.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19439)

*Published on: 7 April 2026*
